---
applyTo: '**'
---
- write only the necessary code to implement the requested feature. it is not necessary to write bulletproof programs
- do not format or otherwise touch the code beyond what is necessary, especially methods
- it is not necessary to catch errors - panics and such are fine
- terseness is good short of unreadability
- comments are not necessary unless they clarify non-obvious code
- if i ask a question, make sure i event want code at all versus just a conceptual answer
